calendar.matters:
Mtn. For Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiffs' Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Paul Vailencourt, Esq. for Plaintiff: Merle Richardson and Martha Sue Lovell.
After hearing the evidence presented and reviewing the moving papers, the Court taken the matter under submission.
P.M.
Motion is granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.
See scanned doc. for details of Order.
